_comment: Template for the smoke-test fixtures file. Copy to ~/zylos/components/openmax/smoke-config.json (same dir as the runtime config.json) and fill in real values. This file holds secrets (CF-Access service token, test-user passwords) and MUST NOT be committed — it lives outside the repo in the component data dir. Any field can also be supplied via env (COCO_API_URL, CF_ACCESS_CLIENT_ID/SECRET, SMOKE_ORG_ID, SMOKE_PROJECT_ID, SMOKE_USER).
